mapper.select:
SELECT id, tenant_id, certification_id, invoice_type, invoice_title, tax_identification_no, invoice_remark, invoice_email, receiver_name, receiver_phone, receiver_address, invoice_status, invoice_time, invoice_url, express_no, is_deleted, create_time, update_time FROM registry_invoice_info
AND tenant_id LIKE CONCAT(#{queryParams.tenantId}, '%')
AND certification_id LIKE CONCAT(#{queryParams.certificationId}, '%')
AND invoice_type LIKE CONCAT(#{queryParams.invoiceType}, '%')
AND invoice_title LIKE CONCAT(#{queryParams.invoiceTitle}, '%')
AND tax_identification_no LIKE CONCAT(#{queryParams.taxIdentificationNo}, '%')
AND invoice_status LIKE CONCAT(#{queryParams.invoiceStatus}, '%')
